commit.message:
fix: implement workaround for beforeinstallprompt not firing

- Check window.deferredPrompt directly at click time instead of relying on state
- If native prompt available, use it
- Try Chrome Web Store install API as fallback
- Show helpful instructions if all else fails
- Improved error handling and logging for debugging

This handles cases where beforeinstallprompt event doesn't fire but app is still installable.
Users can now install with one click, or fall back to clear instructions.

Closes #83

commit.message:
fix: Safari async function scope - assign handleOnboardSubmit to window

Root cause: Safari doesn't hoist async function declarations to global
scope for inline onclick attributes. The error was:
"ReferenceError: Can't find variable: handleOnboardSubmit (line 1145)"

Fix: window.handleOnboardSubmit = async function() instead of
async function handleOnboardSubmit()

Also removed debug test button and processing feedback.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

docs: clarify dual i18n system architecture

Add comprehensive documentation explaining why the app uses two i18n
systems (global + session-local):

1. Global i18n (global.R) - Static UI rendering at startup
2. Session-local session_i18n (app.R) - Runtime translations per user

This dual system prevents User A's language change from affecting
User B in multi-user shiny-server deployments. The architecture is
intentional and should not be simplified.

commit.message:
Add CI lane: governor wrap --receipt-out + governor ci verify (43 tests)

Receipt-producing CI wrapper and policy verifier. ci_wrap() runs commands
with temp-file capture, emits self-contained CiReceiptBundle. ci_verify()
checks required kinds, all-pass, SHA consistency, clean state, and
conflicting-ID detection. Closed ci_kind vocabulary (8 kinds).

feat: establish backend architecture, Express server, and Postgres connection

- Add standalone Express backend (backend/) for Render Web Service deployment
- PostgreSQL via pg pool with SSL, graceful shutdown, and schema init on start
- Routes: /api/chat (Groq + per-env config), /api/dev (magic link + activate), /api/demo (profiles + generate)
- Services: Resend email, Cheerio URL scraper, pdf/csv file extractor, Groq LLM config extraction
- Frontend: Dev + Demo flows wired, vite.config.js replaced middleware with proxy, src/lib/api.js base URL helper
- GSAP entrance animations, typewriter placeholder, dark mode default, notification pulse

- src/config/settings.py: 更新默认配置

agents: redefine Theurgist as continuation facilitator

Role shifts from companion observer / user arc watcher to
continuation facilitator, traveler flux keeper, co-creator.
Theurgist now bridges what is made in claude.innerstellar toward
Priment (innerstellar.csmcl.space) at the crystallization threshold.
Naming collision with CSMCL.Space Theurgist dissolves — both do
the same thing: keep the work moving forward in their domain.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

refactor: replace warning() with debug_log() for consistent logging

Replace warning() calls with debug_log() in non-critical paths for:
- ml_ensemble.R: Model loading warnings -> debug_log
- ml_feature_engineering.R: Unknown type warning -> debug_log
- template_versioning.R: Version file load error -> debug_log
- ui_sidebar.R: Translation warnings -> debug_log

Using debug_log() provides:
- Centralized logging configuration
- Consistent log level control
- No user-facing warning noise in production

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

refactor: consolidate validate_project_data to use validate_project_structure

validate_project_data() now delegates to validate_project_structure() for
structural validation, then adds ISA/PIMS validation on top. This removes
duplication while maintaining backwards compatibility:

- validate_project_structure() is the canonical structural validator
  (returns character vector of errors)
- validate_project_data() wraps it with list(valid, errors) return format
  and includes nested data validation

users will see clear step-by-step instructions instead of generic error.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Haiku 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Harden export dialog edge cases and persist concat download URL

- Show inline error messages in dialog instead of tooltip-only
- Single clip error opens dialog for full details
- Fix allDone: cancelled/idle clips no longer count as complete
- Partial failure shows "X/Y clips done" (amber) instead of "Export failed"
- Separate dialog close from state reset so results persist
- Auto-open dialog for multi-clip exports

commit.message:
Convert ESP32 from STA mode to AP mode

Changes:
- Set WiFi mode to AP (AT+CWMODE=2)
- Configure ESP32 as open WiFi hotspot "OSOYOO_Espro"
- No password required for connection
- Update IP parsing from STAIP to APIP
- ESP32 creates its own WiFi network instead of connecting to router

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

fix: lead notes schema mismatch - nota->conteudo, correct column names

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add text-only ad image generation for CreativeIQ (#303) (#304)

Lead gen advertisers report AI-generated photographic images don't
convert well — their best performers are bold text-on-background
images with specific promises and guarantees. This adds a "Text Ad"
creative type that renders typographic images via Canvas API instead
of Gemini, giving instant, zero-cost, pixel-perfect results.

New: textAdCanvas.ts with 12 style presets, multi-section layout
engine (primary/highlight/anchor), auto-sizing text, and batch
generation with style rotation. GPT-powered generateTextAdCopy()
produces text-ad-optimized suggestions (promises, outcomes, anchors).

Co-authored-by: Claude <claude@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: add peek-scroll gallery and all hiking photos

Rework JourneyStepGallery to show adjacent photos peeking from the
sides (24px peek + 8px gap) so users know they can scroll. Move dot
indicators below the image. Add all 7 mountain photos to the
Discovering Hiking timeline step.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: rework gallery to card stack with slanted side cards

Center image sits on top (z-10), prev/next cards peek from behind
with 4deg rotation, 92% scale, and a dark overlay. Clicking a side
card or using arrows/dots animates the transition (500ms ease-out).
No scroll-based logic — pure state-driven with CSS transitions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: add touch swipe and fix card stack overflow

Add touch swipe support (50px threshold) on the center card for
mobile navigation. Reduce side card size (80% width, 3deg rotation,
0.9 scale) and add px-4 padding to prevent cards from protruding
outside the container.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: fluid drag-to-swipe for card stack gallery

Center card follows finger in real-time during drag. Side cards
interpolate rotation/scale/overlay toward center as you drag toward
them. Releases use velocity + distance threshold to decide snap vs
bounce-back. Easing uses cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1) for a
natural spring-like settle. Rubber-band effect at edges.

commit.message:
fix: 月次予算配分の比率計算を修正（正規化で12ヶ月合計=年間目標に一致）

- 月別売上の過去平均を算出し、合計で正規化して比率を計算
- データがない月は利用可能な月の平均で補完
- 全データなしの場合は均等割（1/12）
- 全指標（売上・粗利・限界利益・営業利益）に同一の季節比率を適用
